name: vibe-forger
description: A local-first mini IDE for editing text files inside an authorized workspace root.

changes: Adds a Monaco-based editor for real text file editing.
Supports exploring, creating, renaming, deleting, opening, editing, and saving files and folders inside the active root.
Restricts filesystem access to the internal workspace or a folder selected explicitly through Forger Desktop.
Rejects path traversal, absolute paths, symlinks outside the authorized root, large files, binary files, and non-UTF-8 text.

catalog.short_description: A simple local IDE for authorized folders.
catalog.description: Vibe Forger is a lightweight local IDE. It opens an internal workspace or a user-selected folder, shows a file explorer, edits text files with Monaco, and keeps file operations scoped to the authorized root.

capabilities.title: Guardar un workspace privado
capabilities.description: Crea y edita archivos dentro del espacio local privado de la app.

capabilities.title: Abrir carpetas que eliges
capabilities.description: Permite explorar y editar archivos de texto dentro de una carpeta seleccionada por ti.

scripts.verify: cd backend && uv run python scripts/verify.py
